info.title: Order
info.description: An order is used to define the material to be produced, plant location where production has to be done, date and time of production, and quantity of goods required. It also defines which components and sequence of operations are to be used and how the order costs are to be settled. This API can be called to perform order related actions such as find and release orders, retrieve order list, and update custom values for given order.

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

get.summary: Finds order data by plant and order.
get.description: Finds the detailed data like order header, SFC list, associated custom data for the given plant and order.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Option to use a comma-separated list of properties to expand. Current supported option is 'schedules'.

parameters.name: ignoreSfcs
parameters.description: Set it to 'true' if you don't need the SFCs in the payload.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Plant for which the request is executed

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The specified language of the header text.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The Accept-Language request HTTP header indicates the natural language and locale that the client prefers.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

post.summary: Creates an order with provided data
post.description: Creates a production order with the provided data and returns details of the created order.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of custom data definitions for the order.
get.description: Retrieves a list of custom data definitions for the order by plant.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant where custom field definitions are defined.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum number of items displayed per page.

parameters.description: The field of the response entity to sort by.

200.description: The list of custom data definitions has been returned.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

post.summary: Creates custom data definitions for the order.
post.description: Creates custom data definitions for the order. The maximum number of custom field definitions in one request is 500. The maximum number of custom field definitions in each plant is 2000.

delete.description: Deletes custom data definitions for the order by definition names.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

409.description: Cannot delete custom data definition because it is used in other objects.

patch.summary: Updates custom data definitions for the order.
patch.description: Updates custom data definitions for the order. The maximum number of custom field definitions in one request is 500.

204.description: The list of custom data definitions has been updated.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

FindOrderResponse.description: This object represents the found orders.

offset.description: Returns the orders according to the pageNumber and pageSize you set

pageNumber.description: Indicates the page where orders are retrieved

pageSize.description: Specify the number of records on one page.

paged.description: Set it to 'true' if you want the orders to be retrieved based on the properties you set in Pageable. If set to 'false', all orders are retrieved.

unpaged.description: Indicates if the orders are retrieved based on the properties you set in Pageable, or they are all retrieved. The value of this field is automatically filled.

empty.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that no order is retrieved. If the value is 'false', it indicates that there are orders retrieved.

sorted.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that the orders retrieved are sorted accordingly. If the value is 'false', it indicates that no order is retrieved.

unsorted.description: If the value is 'false', it indicates that the orders retrieved are sorted accordingly. If the value is 'true', it indicates that no order is retrieved.

empty.description: Returns true if the result is empty

first.description: If the value is 'true'. It indicates that the current page is the first page.

last.description: If the value is 'true'. It indicates that the current page is the last page.

numberOfElements.description: The number of orders in the current page

totalElements.description: The total number of orders that are retrieved

totalPages.description: The total number of pages returned

material.description: The name of the material object

version.description: The version of the material object

ReleaseOrderRequest.title: ReleaseOrderRequest

quantityToRelease.description: The quantity to be released. If you provide this field, then 'targetSfcs' will not be accepted. If you want to use 'targetSfcs' to control the SFCs to be released, then this field must be removed or be empty.

ignoreMaterialLotSize.description: Set it to 'true' if you want to ignore the lot size configuration on material. If it's 'false', the lot size configuration will take effect during the request validation and release process.

ignoreReleasableQuantity.description: Set it to 'true' if you want to release more than the available order quantity and ignore the order release status as well. If it's 'false', you cannot release more than the order quantity, and you cannot release the order if it's already in status 'Released'.

ignoreBomAndRoutingStatus.description: 'false' by default,set it to 'true' if you want to skip bom and routing release status check.

ReleaseOrderRequest.description: This object represents a request to release some SFC quantity from the order.

ReleaseOrderTargetSfc.title: ReleaseOrderTargetSfc

identifier.description: The identifier that new SFC will be generated with. If it's not provided, the system will generate one according to the  numbering configuration.

quantity.description: The quantity that the new SFC will be generated with. If it's not provided, the system will calculate it by material lot size (if lot size is not ignored explicitly), or raise an exception accordingly.

unitOfMeasure.description: Internal code of the unit of measure of the SFC to be released. It will be converted to the material base unit of measure if an alternative unit is provided.

ReleaseOrderTargetSfc.description: This object represents a target SFC in the release order request.

ReleaseOrderResponse.title: ReleaseOrderResponse

sfcs.description: The list of SFCs for checking the component quantity

ReleaseOrderResponse.description: The object represents a release order response.

Sfc.title: This is a shop floor control (SFC) object.

sfcRef.description: The reference string of shop floor control (SFC)

operationRef.description: The operation reference string of shop floor control (SFC)

Sfc.description: Shop floor control (SFC) object in order response object

ReleaseOrderInBackgroundRequest.title: ReleaseOrderInBackgroundRequest

quantityToRelease.description: The quantity to be released. If you provide this field, then 'targetSfcs' will not be accepted. If you want to use 'targetSfcs' to control the SFCs to be released, then this field must be removed or be empty.

ignoreMaterialLotSize.description: Set it to 'true' if you want to ignore the lot size configuration on material. If it's 'false', the lot size configuration will take effect during the request validation and release process.

ignoreReleasableQuantity.description: Set it to 'true' if you want to release more than the available order quantity and ignore the order release status as well. If it's 'false', you cannot release more than the order quantity, and you cannot release the order if it's already in status 'Released'.

ReleaseOrderInBackgroundRequest.description: This object represents a request to release some SFC quantity from the order in background.

ReleaseOrderInBackgroundResponse.title: ReleaseOrderInBackgroundResponse

sfcs.description: The list of SFCs that to be created

ReleaseOrderInBackgroundResponse.description: The object represents a release order in background response.

routing.description: The name of the routing object

routingType.description: The internal type of the routing object. Deprecated. Use type field instead.

type.description: The type of the routing object

version.description: The version of the routing object

attribute.description: The attribute of the custom value.

value.description: The value of the custom value.

enabled.description: If true, this component is a valid substitute for the BOM component.

required.description: If true, this component must be substituted for the BOM component.

priority.description: The priority of the alternate component.

reservationNumber.description: The reservation number of the BOM component.

reservationItemNumber.description: The reservation item of the BOM component.

totalQuantityInBaseUnit.description: The planned total quantity of the BOM component in material base unit of measure.

baseUnit.description: The internal code of the base unit of measure of the BOM component. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

baseIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the base unit of measure of the BOM component. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

batchNumber.description: The batch number of the BOM component.

storageLocation.description: The storage location of the BOM component.

productionSupplyArea.description: The production supply area of the BOM component.

warehouseNumber.description: The warehouse number of the BOM component.

components.description: The component list of the BOM.

customValues.description: The custom values of the BOM.

material.description: The name of the material. The material and sequence combination should be able to uniquely determine one BOM component. This combination is referred to in the routingStepComponent section.

sequence.description: The BOM component sequence. The material and sequence combination should be able to uniquely determine one BOM component. This combination is referred to in the routingStepComponent section.

erpSequence.description: The position of the component in the order of components as displayed in the ERP system.

componentType.description: The type of the BOM component.

totalQuantityInBaseUnit.description: The total quantity of the BOM component in material base unit.

baseUnit.description: The internal code of the base unit of measure of the BOM component. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

baseIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the base unit of measure of the BOM component. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

assemblyQuantityAsRequired.description: If true, the quantity of this component isn't tracked.

alternatesEnabled.description: If true, the BOM component alternates are used for this component instead of the material alternates.

alternativeItemGroup.description: The alternative item group of the BOM component.

assemblyDataType.description: The data type of the BOM component. It must be ASSEMBLY category.

backflushEnabled.description: If true, the material consumption is posted automatically.

componentScrap.description: The percentage of scrap of the BOM component that occurs during production.

storageLocation.description: The storage location of the BOM component.

batchNumber.description: The batch number of the BOM component.

reservationNumber.description: The reservation number of the BOM component.

reservationItemNumber.description: The reservation item of the BOM component.

warehouseNumber.description: The warehouse number of the BOM component.

productionSupplyArea.description: The production supply area of the BOM component.

customValues.description: The custom values of the BOM component.

refDes.description: The reference designator where a BOM component should be assembled.

quantity.description: The number of pieces to assemble at this reference designator.

erpRefDesSequence.description: The reference designator sequence number in the ERP system.

description.description: The description of the BOM's reference designator.
The description of the standard value.

value.description: The context of the long text.

language.description: The language code of the long text.

mimeType.description: The mime type of the long text.

operationActivity.description: The name of the operation activity.

resourceType.description: The resource type of the operation activity.

resource.description: The default resource of the operation activity.

requiredTimeInProcess.description: The required time in process of this operation.

version.description: The version of the operation activity. It's required if you're using an existing operation. If not provided, it defaults to 'ERP001'.

routingStepId.description: The routing step ID. It refers to the stepId in the routingStep section.

setupTimeUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the planned setup duration.

setupTimeIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the planned setup duration. It's ignored if the setupTimeUnit is provided.

processingTimeUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the planned processing duration.

processingTimeIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the planned processing duration. It's ignored if the processingTimeUnit is provided.

teardownTimeUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the planned teardown duration.

teardownTimeIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the planned teardown duration. It's ignored if the teardownTimeUnit is provided.

plannedQuantityInBaseUnit.description: The planned quantity of the schedule in the base unit of measure of the order.

minSendAheadQuantityUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure for the minimum send ahead quantity.

minSendAheadQuantityIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure for the minimum send ahead quantity. It's ignored if the minSendAheadQuantityUnit is provided.

minOverlapTimeUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the minimum overlap time.

minOverlapTimeIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the minimum overlap time. It's ignored if the minOverlapTimeUnit is provided.

entryRoutingStepId.description: The entry routing step of the routing. It refers to the stepId in the routingStep section.

quantityValidation.description: Indicates if quantity validation is required during production.

automaticGoodsReceipt.description: Indicates if the routing is configured for an automatic goods receipt.

relaxedFlow.description: Indicates if the routing is relaxed flow.

routingOperationGroups.description: The operation groups of the routing.

routingSteps.description: The routing steps of the routing.

customValues.description: The custom values of the routing.

baseQuantityUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the base quantity.

baseQuantityIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the base quantity. It's ignored if the baseQuantityUnit is provided.

weighRelevant.description: Indicates if the operation is weight relevant.

automaticGoodsReceipt.description: Indicates if the operation is configured for an automatic goods receipt.

erpServiceActivityType.description: Describes the activity produced by a cost center and is measured in units of time or quantity. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceWork.description: The amount of work involved in performing the activity. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceWorkUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of work. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceWorkIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of work. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceDuration.description: The normal duration required to carry out the activity. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceDurationUnit.description: The internal code of the unit in which the normal duration of the activity is expressed. This field applies only to service orders.

serviceDurationIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit in which the normal duration of the activity is expressed. This field applies only to service orders.

numberOfServiceCapacities.description: The number of the capacities of the capacity category that are required to carry out the operation. This field applies only to service orders.

customValues.description: The custom values of the routing step.

routingOperationGroup.description: The name of the operation group of the routing.

operationNumber.description: The operation number of the operation group.

description.description: The description of the operation group.

routingStepIds.description: The routing steps that belong to the operation group. This refers to the stepId in the routingStep section.

stepId.description: The step ID of the routing step.

description.description: The description of the routing step.

workCenter.description: The name of the work center.

reportingStep.description: Indicates how this step is known in the external system.

erpSequence.description: The sequence of the steps within a routing. The values in ERP are 0 - Standard, 1 - Parallel, 2 - Alternative.

entry.description: If true, this is an entry routing step.

lastReportingStep.description: Indicates if it's the last reporting step.

controlKey.description: The control key of the routing step.

nextStepIds.description: The list of the next possible routing steps. It refers to the stepId.

routingStepComponents.description: The list of components to be assembled at this step.

material.description: The material of the BOM component. Material and sequence combination should be able to uniquely determine a BOM component.

sequence.description: The sequence of the BOM component. Material and sequence combination should be able to uniquely determine a BOM component.

quantity.description: The number of pieces of the component to be assembled at this step.

serialNumber.description: The serial number of the finished product.

number.description: The number that identifies the notification.

sequence.description: The sequence of this standard value. Should be in rang [1, 6].

descriptions.description: The descriptions of this standard value in different languages.

targetQuantity.description: The target quantity of this standard value.

targetQuantityUnit.description: The internal code of the unit of measure of the target quantity of this standard value. Either targetQuantityUnit or targetQuantityIsoUnit is required.

targetQuantityIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the unit of measure of the target quantity of this standard value. Either targetQuantityUnit or targetQuantityIsoUnit is required.

orderCategory.description: The order category of the order.

productionVersion.description: The production version of the order.

plannedQuantityInBaseUnit.description: The planned quantity of the order in the base unit of measure of the finished product.

baseUnit.description: The internal code of the base unit of measure. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

baseIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the base unit of measure. It's ignored if the baseUnit is provided. Either baseUnit or baseIsoUnit is required.

plannedQuantityInProductionUnit.description: The planned quantity of the order in the production unit of measure.

productionUnit.description: The internal code of the production unit of measure.

productionIsoUnit.description: The ISO code of the production unit of measure. It's ignored if the productionUnit is provided.

batchNumber.description: The batch number of the order.

erpOrder.description: Indicates if the order is a replication of an ERP order. Currently only 'true' is supported.

erpBomId.description: The identifier of the bill of material defined in the integrated ERP system.

erpBomUsage.description: Indicates in which context or area the ERP bill of material is used, for example design or production. The ERP BOM Usage is defined in the integrated ERP system.

erpAlternativeBomId.description: The identifier of the alternative bill of material defined in the integrated ERP system.

taskListType.description: The key that classifies task lists according to their functionality.

erpRoutingGroup.description: The key of the routing group defined in the integrated ERP system.

erpGroupCounter.description: The key of the group counter defined in the integrated ERP system.

priority.description: The number to specify the manufacturing priority of the order. The allowed number range is from 1 to 999.

underdeliveryTolerance.description: The percentage of the acceptable deviation below the ordered quantity.

minimumDeliveryQuantity.description: The minimum delivery quantity of the order. If it's not provided, the value is calculated from the underdeliveryTolerance.

overdeliveryTolerance.description: The percentage of the acceptable deviation above the ordered quantity.

maximumDeliveryQuantity.description: The maximum delivery quantity of the order. If it's not provided, the value is calculated from the overdeliveryTolerance.

plannedStart.description: The planned start date/time of the order.

plannedEnd.description: The planned end date/time of the order.

scheduledStart.description: The scheduled start date/time of the order.

scheduledEnd.description: The scheduled end date/time of the order.

finalDueDate.description: The latest date by which a maintenance activity must be completed.

putawayStorageLocation.description: The putaway storage location for finished product.

warehouseNumber.description: The warehouse number for finished product.

equipmentNumber.description: The number by which a piece of equipment can be identified.

plannerGroup.description: The key that identifies the maintenance planning plant.

maintenancePlan.description: The number that identifies a maintenance plan.

personResponsible.description: The person who is responsible for the order/notification.

serialNumbers.description: The serial numbers for finished product.

notifications.description: The notifications of the service order.

operationActivities.description: If you're using existing operations, there's no need to specify them in this list.

CreateOrderApiRequest.description: Request to create the given order.

x-sap-shortText: Perform order related activities, such as getting order details and releasing the order for manufacturing
